existing.name: Ray Spear
existing.description: VZ Chassis Racing Mini 4WD designed by PDC Designworks. Transparent green body with yellow roller arms. Imported exclusively to Greenland.

existing.name: Shadow Shark
existing.description: AR Chassis REV Series predator. Sleek dark blue and black shark-themed body. Box stock ready. Imported exclusively to Greenland.

existing.name: Flame Astute
existing.description: AR Chassis REV Series No.5. Bold red F1-style body with flame graphics. Box stock ready. Imported exclusively to Greenland.

existing.name: MINI 4WD STARTER PACK FM-A BALANCED SPEC (ROWDY BULL)
existing.description: This convenient Starter Pack includes the Rowdy Bull assembly kit together with a set of basic Grade-Up parts designed to give the model a balanced setup.

existing.name: MAGNUM SABER
existing.description: Iconic Magnum livery on AR Chassis. White and blue fully cowled body with green wheels and gold eagle emblem. Pre-assembled. Only 1 unit — sold out from supplier, never restocking.

existing.name: CYCLONE MAGNUM PREMIUM
existing.description: Iconic Magnum livery on AR Chassis. White and blue fully cowled body with green wheels and gold eagle emblem. Box stock kit — build it your way.

existing.name: Z Wing Magnum
existing.description: Rare polycarbonate transparent body Magnum variant on AR Chassis. Pre-assembled and race-ready. Only 1 unit — sold out from supplier, never restocking.

existing.name: Diospada Premium
existing.description: Fully Cowled AR Chassis supercar. Red body with gold cockpit. Premium build quality. Imported exclusively to Greenland.

existing.name: Beak Stinger G
existing.description: Fully Cowled AR Chassis with aggressive bird predator design. Black and red with spider web graphics. Straight from the manga. Imported exclusively to Greenland.

existing.name: Gun Bluster XTO Premium
existing.description: Fully Cowled FM-A Chassis in metallic blue with yellow lightning graphics and red wheels. Imported exclusively to Greenland.

existing.name: Aero Thunder Shot AdPack TKC
existing.description: AR Chassis limited edition. Yellow and black aggressive aero body, advanced TKC special. Imported exclusively to Greenland. Extremely limited — sourced from a sold-out batch.

existing.name: Mach Frame Philippine Special
existing.description: Limited Edition Philippine Special on FM-A Chassis. Dual body color variants — light blue and red plated. A collector's piece representing Filipino Mini 4WD culture in Greenland.

existing.name: Exflowly Polycarbonate Purple
existing.description: Mini 4WD PRO Series. Transparent purple polycarbonate body with chrome wheels. Double shaft motor included. Imported exclusively to Greenland.

existing.name: Geo Glider Asia Challenge 2026
existing.description: 2026 Asia Challenge Special Edition on FM-A Chassis. Black and teal futuristic body with TMAC competition branding. One of the rarest in our collection.

new.name: Cyclone Magnum Memorial 25th Anniversary
new.description: Anniversary collector kit on the Super TZ-X chassis. Keep it separate from the recommended beginner chassis selection.

new.name: Mini 4WD Display Case
new.description: Shared display case — one stock pool used for both a standalone purchase and a car-plus-case bundle. Supplier cost (300 PHP/case) is a known assumption pending later receipt verification; the 229 DKK standalone / 189 DKK bundled prices are locked and independently margin-verified (lib/pricing/displayCase.ts).

blocked.name: Neo-VQS
blocked.description: Popular VZ platform with a low body and wide parts compatibility. A practical beginner car with a clear upgrade path.

blocked.name: Cross Spear 01
blocked.description: Modern VZ kit for racers who want a newer body while keeping the same beginner-friendly upgrade ecosystem.

blocked.name: Mach Frame
blocked.description: Front-motor FM-A car with predictable braking and strong stability. One of the easiest chassis to explain to new racers.

blocked.name: K4 Gambol
blocked.description: Fun FM-A kit with a distinctive body. Suitable for beginners who prefer style without losing B-MAX upgrade compatibility.

blocked.name: Aero Avante
blocked.description: Reliable AR chassis with wide parts compatibility and simple maintenance. A strong shop demonstration and workshop car.

blocked.name: DCR-01
blocked.description: Balanced MA dual-shaft car with simple assembly and excellent stability. One of the best introductions to PRO motors.

blocked.name: Ignicion
blocked.description: Modern MA kit that combines easy assembly, balanced handling and a straightforward B-MAX upgrade route.

blocked.name: Raikiri
blocked.description: Popular MA kit with a low sports-car body. Good for customers who value appearance and stable handling.

blocked.name: Avante Mk.III Nero
blocked.description: Classic MS dual-shaft platform for racers who want to learn center-chassis tuning and PRO motor setups.

blocked.name: Ray Stinger Premium
blocked.description: Super-II option for classic Fully Cowled fans. Useful as a special-order chassis rather than a large stock item.

blocked.name: Basic Tune-Up Parts Set for VZ Chassis
blocked.description: The simplest first upgrade for a VZ car. Adds the essential plates, rollers and control parts in one compatible package.

blocked.name: Basic Tune-Up Parts Set for FM-A Chassis
blocked.description: A complete first-step FM-A package. Recommended before customers buy individual aluminum rollers or faster motors.

blocked.name: Basic Tune-Up Parts Set for MA Chassis
blocked.description: Beginner bundle for MA cars that adds stability parts without requiring customers to understand every component separately.

blocked.name: Basic Tune-Up Parts Set for AR Chassis
blocked.description: Straightforward AR upgrade set for learning front and rear plates, rollers and basic landing control.

blocked.name: Torque-Tuned 2 Motor
blocked.description: More acceleration and climbing power than the kit motor. Best first motor for short or technical layouts.

blocked.name: Rev-Tuned 2 Motor
blocked.description: Higher-rev motor for layouts with longer straights. Recommend only after the car is stable.

blocked.name: Atomic-Tuned 2 Motor
blocked.description: Balanced first motor upgrade for customers who do not yet know whether they need torque or maximum revs.

blocked.name: Light-Dash Motor
blocked.description: Intermediate motor between tuned motors and Hyper-Dash. Suitable after basic brakes and rollers are installed.

blocked.name: Hyper-Dash 3 Motor
blocked.description: Strong all-round race motor. Sell with a warning that the car should already have brakes, rollers and landing control.

blocked.name: Torque-Tuned 2 Motor PRO
blocked.description: Dual-shaft torque motor for MA, MS and ME cars. A safe first PRO motor upgrade.

blocked.name: Rev-Tuned 2 Motor PRO
blocked.description: Dual-shaft high-rev motor for MA, MS and ME cars. Best after basic stability parts are fitted.

blocked.name: Atomic-Tuned 2 Motor PRO
blocked.description: Balanced dual-shaft motor for new MA, MS and ME racers.

blocked.name: Light-Dash Motor PRO
blocked.description: Intermediate dual-shaft motor for racers moving beyond tuned motors.

blocked.name: Hyper-Dash Motor PRO
blocked.description: Competitive all-round dual-shaft motor. Recommend brakes and stable roller settings before use.

blocked.name: Brake Sponge Set Mild 1/2/3mm Blue
blocked.description: Mild brake material in three thicknesses. Easy for beginners to tune without slowing the car too aggressively.

blocked.name: Brake Sponge Set 1/2/3mm White
blocked.description: General-purpose brake material in three thicknesses for adjusting slope entry and jump speed.

blocked.name: Brake Set for AR Chassis
blocked.description: Simple bolt-on brake system for compatible chassis. Useful when customers want a complete brake assembly.

blocked.name: FRP Rear Brake Stay Set
blocked.description: Strong rear brake base that lets racers position sponge more accurately.

blocked.name: Front Under Guard
blocked.description: Helps the front of the car pass track joints and slopes more smoothly while protecting the chassis underside.

blocked.name: Mass Damper Set
blocked.description: Basic weights that reduce bouncing after jumps. One of the most useful stability upgrades for new racers.

blocked.name: Mass Damper Set Heavy
blocked.description: Heavier landing-control option for cars that still bounce or leave the track after jumps.

blocked.name: Slimline Mass Damper Set
blocked.description: Compact dampers that fit many B-MAX layouts without taking excessive space.

blocked.name: Side Mass Damper Set for AR Chassis
blocked.description: Complete side-damper package for compatible chassis. Easier than buying plates and weights separately.

blocked.name: Side Mass Damper Set for MA Chassis
blocked.description: MA-focused side-damper set that gives new racers a clear bolt-on landing-control solution.

blocked.name: Low-Friction Roller Set
blocked.description: Low-cost roller upgrade for smoother wall contact. Ideal before customers invest in aluminum rollers.

blocked.name: Low-Friction Plastic Double Rollers 13-12mm
blocked.description: Budget double rollers that improve wall contact and stability.

blocked.name: Low-Friction Plastic Double Rollers with Rubber Rings 13-12mm
blocked.description: Double rollers with rubber rings for additional control where the setup needs more wall grip.

blocked.name: Double Aluminum Rollers 13-12mm
blocked.description: Popular durable front roller option for competitive B-MAX setups.

blocked.name: 17mm Aluminum Rollers with Plastic Rings
blocked.description: 17mm aluminum rollers with plastic rings for smooth and durable wall contact.

blocked.name: HG 19mm Aluminum Ball-Race Rollers Ringless
blocked.description: Common 19mm rear roller choice for stable, low-friction B-MAX setups.

blocked.name: Long Stabilizing Pole and 13mm Roller Set
blocked.description: Simple stabilizer package that helps keep the car upright when it leans against the course wall.

blocked.name: Large-Diameter Stabilizer Head Set 11/15mm
blocked.description: Stabilizer heads for reducing rollovers and wall climbing.

blocked.name: Hi-Mount Tube Stabilizer Set Black
blocked.description: Compact high-mounted stabilizer option for more advanced B-MAX layouts.

blocked.name: FRP Multi Roller Setting Stay
blocked.description: Affordable universal FRP plate for adding and positioning rollers.

blocked.name: FRP Rear Multi Roller Setting Stay
blocked.description: Affordable rear FRP plate for rollers, dampers and brake assemblies.

blocked.name: FRP Wide Front Plate for AR Chassis
blocked.description: Wide front FRP plate that makes roller placement easier on compatible chassis.

blocked.name: FRP Wide Rear Plate for AR Chassis
blocked.description: Wide rear FRP plate for stable roller spacing and basic B-MAX layouts.

blocked.name: FRP Wide Front Plate for Fully Cowled Mini 4WD
blocked.description: Front plate designed for many Fully Cowled bodies where standard plates may interfere.

blocked.name: FRP Wide Front Plate for VZ Chassis
blocked.description: Modern wide front FRP plate with broad compatibility and clear roller mounting positions.

blocked.name: HG Carbon Wide Front Plate 1.5mm
blocked.description: Lighter and stiffer front plate for racers upgrading from FRP.

blocked.name: HG Carbon Wide Rear Plate 1.5mm
blocked.description: Lighter and stiffer rear plate for competitive setups.

blocked.name: Super Hard 26mm Tires and Carbon Wheels
blocked.description: Stable all-round wheel and tire set that reduces bounce and is easy to recommend to beginners.

blocked.name: Low-Friction 26mm Tires and Carbon Wheels
blocked.description: Lower-grip tire set for carrying more speed through corners once the car is already stable.

blocked.name: Low-Friction Narrow 24mm Tires and Carbon Wheels
blocked.description: Small-diameter narrow setup for lowering the car and tuning speed on technical tracks.

blocked.name: Low-Friction 31mm Tires and Carbon Wheels
blocked.description: Large-diameter option for advanced speed-focused builds. Keep as limited stock or special order.

blocked.name: Carbon-Reinforced 8T Pinion Gears 6pcs
blocked.description: Durable replacement pinions for routine maintenance and motor changes.

blocked.name: Carbon-Reinforced G13 and 8T Pinion Gear Set
blocked.description: Reinforced gear and pinion set for reducing wear in upgraded drivetrains.

blocked.name: Setting Gear Set for AR Chassis
blocked.description: Useful AR replacement and tuning gear set.

blocked.name: Setting Gear Set for FM-A Chassis
blocked.description: Useful FM-A replacement and tuning gear set.

blocked.name: PRO High-Speed EX Gear Set
blocked.description: High-speed gear option for MA, MS and ME cars. Explain gear ratio before sale.

blocked.name: High-Speed EX Counter Gear Set 3.7:1
blocked.description: 3.7:1 counter gear option for compatible single-shaft cars.

blocked.name: Mini 4WD PRO Gear Bearing Set
blocked.description: Ball bearings and gear shafts that reduce counter-gear friction in MA and MS cars.

blocked.name: Low-Friction Plastic Bearing Set
blocked.description: Affordable low-friction replacement bearings for beginners not ready for full ball bearings.

blocked.name: HG Round-Hole Ball Bearings 4pcs
blocked.description: Premium axle bearings for smoother wheel rotation and improved efficiency.

blocked.name: 60mm Reinforced Shafts Black 4pcs
blocked.description: Stronger 60mm axles for compatible chassis. Useful replacement stock item.

blocked.name: 72mm Reinforced Shafts Black 4pcs
blocked.description: Stronger 72mm axles for wide chassis and compatible front-motor setups.

blocked.name: Stainless Steel Screw Set 15/20/25/30mm
blocked.description: Common screw lengths for adding plates, rollers and dampers. A high-repeat-purchase item.

blocked.name: Stainless Steel Countersunk Screw Set 10/12/20/25/30mm
blocked.description: Countersunk hardware for cleaner plate mounting where the rules and plate design permit it.

blocked.name: Stainless Steel Countersunk Screw Set 6/8/15mm
blocked.description: Short countersunk screws for compact plate and brake installations.

blocked.name: Aluminum Spacer Set 12/6.7/6/3/1.5mm
blocked.description: Multiple spacer sizes for setting roller and stabilizer height.

blocked.name: Lightweight Plastic Spacer Set
blocked.description: Budget lightweight spacers for learning setup height before buying more aluminum hardware.

blocked.name: Mini 4WD Multipurpose Tape 10mm Blue
blocked.description: Useful for securing batteries and temporary setup work. Easy add-on sale.

blocked.name: Mini 4WD Car Catcher
blocked.description: Safer way to collect fast cars from the track. Recommended for every racer.

blocked.name: Mini 4WD Oil Applicator
blocked.description: Precision applicator for controlled lubrication without flooding the motor or bearings.

blocked.name: Mini 4WD F Grease
blocked.description: Low-friction grease for routine gear and drivetrain maintenance.

blocked.name: Mini 4WD Motor Case 2
blocked.description: Protects and organizes spare motors and small parts.
